message:
fix(cli,db,server): percent-decoded resource URIs, legacy index migration, and diagnostic accuracy

Robot CLI navigate refactor:
- Percent-decode path segments in resource:// URIs so agents can use
  URL-encoded project human_keys (e.g. %2Ftmp%2Fproj → /tmp/proj) as
  path components in navigate commands
- Resolve project/agents/file_reservations paths via resolve_project_sync()
  instead of raw slug lookups, enabling human_key-based navigation
- Parse resource query parameters (limit, include_bodies, urgent_only,
  since/since_ts) and thread them through to inbox/outbox/thread builders
  instead of hardcoded defaults
- Propagate resolved project slug through all navigate result branches
  so the envelope _meta.project reflects the actual project context
- Add parse_resource_bool() and parse_resource_limit() helpers with
  RESOURCE_URI_LIMIT_MAX (10K) safety cap
- Add comprehensive test covering project key navigation across
  project, agents, and file_reservations endpoints

Database fixes:
- Add schema migration v10_drop_legacy_agents_lower_name_index to remove
  the legacy uq_agents_name_ci partial/expression index that canonical
  SQLite can parse but the runtime FrankenConnection parser cannot,
  preventing fresh startup failures on existing storage.sqlite3 files
- Replace JOIN-based agent name resolution in fetch_inbox_global and
  count_unread_global with IN-subquery pattern for correct cross-project
  case-insensitive matching
- Add test verifying sqlite_init drops legacy index before runtime open

TUI system health diagnostic fix:
- Correct rendered_count to track path_probes.len() (matching raw_count)
  instead of lines.len(), since this diagnostic scope measures HTTP path
  probe coverage, not remediation line output

Config: update MCP server URLs from port 8877 to 8880 across codex,
cursor, and gemini MCP config files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3749,11 +3749,10 @@ pub async fn fetch_inbox_global(
                 m.importance, m.ack_required, m.created_ts, m.attachments, \
                 r.kind, s.name as sender_name, r.ack_ts, p.slug as project_slug \
          FROM message_recipients r \
-         JOIN agents a ON a.id = r.agent_id \
          JOIN messages m ON m.id = r.message_id \
          JOIN agents s ON s.id = m.sender_id \
          JOIN projects p ON p.id = m.project_id \
-         WHERE a.name = ? COLLATE NOCASE",
+         WHERE r.agent_id IN (SELECT id FROM agents WHERE name = ? COLLATE NOCASE)",
     );
 
     let mut params: Vec<Value> = vec![Value::Text(agent_name.to_string())];
@@ -3848,10 +3847,10 @@ pub async fn count_unread_global(
 
     let sql = "SELECT p.id as project_id, p.slug as project_slug, COUNT(*) as unread_count \
                FROM message_recipients r \
-               JOIN agents a ON a.id = r.agent_id \
                JOIN messages m ON m.id = r.message_id \
                JOIN projects p ON p.id = m.project_id \
-               WHERE a.name = ? COLLATE NOCASE AND r.read_ts IS NULL \
+               WHERE r.agent_id IN (SELECT id FROM agents WHERE name = ? COLLATE NOCASE) \
+               AND r.read_ts IS NULL \
                GROUP BY p.id, p.slug \
                ORDER BY unread_count DESC";
